title: The Emperor's Nightingale
writer: Vítezslav Nezval, Hans Christian Andersen, Jirí Brdecka
actors: Helena Patockova, Jaromir Sobotoa, Detsky pevecky sbor Jana Kuhna
plot: A Chinese emperor prefers the tinkling of a bejeweled mechanical bird to the song of a real nightingale. When the Emperor is near death, a nightingale's song restores his health and teaches him to revolt against his glittering but...
